title: centaurea × matritensis
intro: Centaurea × matritensis, also known as the Spanish scabious, is a hybrid plant species within the Asteraceae family, combining the characteristics of Centaurea solstitialis and Centaurea cyanus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Centaurea × matritensis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
